entity: Donovan Mitchell 71 PTS vs Chicago Bulls on 2023-01-02 (CLE 145-134 OT; tied for 9th-highest single-game point total in NBA history)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM fact_player_game_log WHERE player_name = 'Donovan Mitchell' AND game_date = '2023-01-02' AND pts = 71

notes: Active player (still on CLE in 2025-26); match:gte per the active-player convention. Mitchell's 71 came in an overtime game, and the BBR box-score URL uses the home team (CLE) as the suffix.
